infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DoneMark uses the camera so you can capture a photo as proof that you completed an important action.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DoneMark needs access to your photos so you can attach an existing image as proof that an important action was completed.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DoneMark uses the microphone so you can record a short voice note as proof that an important action was completed.

plugins.cameraPermission: DoneMark uses the camera so you can capture a photo as proof that you completed an important action.
plugins.photosPermission: DoneMark needs access to your photos so you can attach an existing image as proof that an important action was completed.

plugins.microphonePermission: DoneMark uses the microphone so you can record a short voice note as proof that an important action was completed.
